characters.name: 50s Batman
characters.description: 50s BatmanPersonal InformationAlias(es)Bruce WayneSeries InformationPortrayed byGary OwensOnly appearanceLegends of the Dark KnightAppearances1 Episode 50s Batmanwas howMattenvisioned the realBatmanto be. Matt had heard of Batman from his uncle, a guard at theWalker Music Center. He was really neat and friendly. He stopped theJokerfrom robbing theWalker Music Center.

characters.name: 50s Joker
characters.description: 50s JokerPersonal InformationStatusArrestedSeries InformationPortrayed byMichael McKeanOnly appearanceLegends of the Dark KnightAppearances1 Episode 50s Jokerwas howMattimagined theJokerto be. Matt had heard of theJokerfrom his uncle, a guard at theWalker Music Center.Jokerstaged a robbery of the score ofPagliacci, and knocked out Matt's uncle. That made Matt's friends question how his uncle could have possibly given an accurate account of events, to which Matt shrugged and said it's the way his uncle tells it.

characters.name: 50s Joker's Henchmen
characters.description: 50s Joker's HenchmenPersonal InformationNameUnknownAffiliation50s JokerRankHenchmenSeries InformationPortrayed byHenchmen #1:Kevin ConroyHenchmen #2:Robert CostanzoOnly appearanceLegends of the Dark KnightAppearances1 Episode The50s Joker's Henchmenwere two unnamed thugs working for the50s Joker. They joined their boss in his robbery of a valuable manuscript at theWalker Music Center. Before they could get away,50s Batmanand50s Robinarrive and fought the two henchmen, but Joker throws a sousaphone around Robin, and Batman gets knocked out by one of the henchmen.

characters.name: 80s Batman
characters.description: 80s BatmanPersonal InformationNameBruce WayneAffiliation80s RobinSeries InformationPortrayed byMichael IronsideOnly appearanceLegends of the Dark KnightAppearances1 Episode80s Batmanwas howCarrieenvisioned the realBatmanto be. In a scenario envisioned by Carrie, Batman was a grim, middle-aged crime-fighter in a gritty near-futureGotham Cityoverrun by a violent gang known as theMutants. In the scenario,Robinwas captured by a member of the gang, who began to interrogate her on Batman's whereabouts. Batman appeared and saved her, then interrogated the thug as to the whereabouts of hisleader. Later, at a dump, Batman interrupted a speech by the Mutant Leader. He showed up in a heavily armored tank-likeBatmobile. He fired rubber bullets at the gang members, causing them to scatter, whilst Robin left the tank and fought them using a slingshot. The Mutant Leader faced up to the tank and called Batman out to fight hand-to-hand personally.

characters.name: 80s Batman
characters.description: 80s BatmanPersonal InformationNameBruce WayneAffiliation80s RobinSeries InformationPortrayed byMichael IronsideOnly appearanceLegends of the Dark KnightAppearances1 Episode80s Batmanwas howCarrieenvisioned the realBatmanto be. The Mutant Leader faced up to the tank and called Batman out to fight hand-to-hand personally.

characters.name: 80s Robin
characters.description: 80s RobinPersonal InformationNameCarrie KellyAffiliation80s BatmanSeries InformationPortrayed byAnndi McAfeeOnly appearanceLegends of the Dark KnightAppearances1 EpisodeIn Carrie's imagination,Robin, Batman's trusted sidekick, was actually a girl that bears her likeness. She was captured by the Mutants when she was caught spying, but was saved by Batman. During Batman's fight with the Mutant Leader, Robin joins in by firing pellets with her slingshot at the Mutants. The 80s Robin is Carrie Kelley, who became the third Robin (after Dick Grayson and the late Jason Todd) in Frank Miller'sThe Dark Knight Returns. In the sequelThe Dark Knight Strikes Again, she changed her name to Catgirl.

In the sequelThe Dark Knight Strikes Again, she changed her name to Catgirl.

characters.name: Acrophobic Man
characters.description: Acrophobic ManPersonal InformationNameUnknownSeries InformationPortrayed byEfrem Zimbalist Jr.(uncredited)Only appearanceNever FearAppearances1 Episode TheAcrophobic Manis an unnamed man. He suffered a fear of heights, until he was sprayed by theScarecrowwith a gas that takes away fear. He was swinging over the rooftops of Gotham City. The man was spotted byBatmanandRobin, which led him into causing a serious accident. Batman and Robin managed to prevent the other citizens getting hurt and capture the man and tried to reason with him, but he has no sense of fear and is willing to risk his and other people's lives for the thrill of it all, and the heroes took him to the authorities.

characters.name: Airship Captain (Showdown)
characters.description: Airship CaptainPersonal InformationNameUnknownAffiliationRa's al GhulRankAirship captainStatusArrestedSeries InformationPortrayed byMichael BellOnly appearanceShowdownAppearances1 Episode TheAirship Captainwas a henchman working forRa's al Ghulin 1883. He was part of thePhoenix's attack on the Transcontinental Railroad, destroying everything in its path, but the attack was thwarted byJonah Hex, who destroyed the airship's cannons and killed most of the crew. When a few of his men attempted to shoot Hex, the captain ordered them to stop before they hit and blow up the hydrogen cells. After Hex crippled the airship, Ra's ordered the captain and his men to abandon the airship while he escapes on a glider. The captain was likely caught and arrested by the Confederate Troops.

characters.name: Airship Captain (Showdown)

characters.name: Alaskan Timberwolves
characters.description: Alaskan TimberwolvesPersonal InformationAffiliationGotham ZooRankAnimalsStatusAliveSeries InformationPortrayed byUncreditedOnly appearanceMoon of the WolfAppearances1 EpisodeTheAlaskan Timberwolvesare a species of wolves originating from Alaska. They are one of the many animals seen at theGotham Zoo. One night,Professor Milobribed zoo guardJohn Hamnerto leave their cage open so he could extract some of their blood for a newserumhe was creating that would increase the physical attributes of the user, although it had the side-effect of turning them, into werewolves as it was illegal and untested. When the athlete,Anthony Romulussought Milo out for an edge to win theAutmn Games, he gave him the serum. Although he was enjoying his new-found wealth and popularity in the mean time, soon the side effects had started and he was transformed, into a living werewolf that, would do Milo's bidding in order to get a cure. Later,Harvey Bullockhad investigated Hamner at the zoo about the wolves, threatening to throw him, into the timberwolf cage, if he did not tell the truth. He eventually told Bullock about the bribing, but had claimed that, he did not know the identity of the man, who had hired him. Hamner was placed under arrest.

characters.name: Alex
characters.description: AlexPersonal InformationNameAlexAffiliationMaxie ZeusSeries InformationPortrayed byNicholas Savalas(uncredited)Only appearanceFire from OlympusAppearances1 EpisodeAlexander, orAlexfor short, was one ofMaximilian Zeus' henchmen. Alex cared little for all the "Greek stuff" his boss did, but played along anyway. But he too saw that his boss was sliding down. When theElectronic Discharge Cannonwas aimed at a police blimp, he knew Maxie was too crazy—he would not even fear the law anymore. When Clio argued with Maxie, he ordered to have him tied to the EDC. Both Alex and his partner were hesitant, but Alex complied when he saw his partner go down to one of Maxie's thunderbolts. WhenBatmanbroke into "Olympus", Maxie Zeus ordered Alex to attack him. But Alex refused — he couldn't beat the Batman anyway. So Maxie turned on him, and set his robot harpies on him. Alex outran the machine gun fire and dove in the pool.

characters.name: Alice
characters.description: AlicePersonal InformationNameAliceSpouse(s)BillyMaritalEngagedSeries InformationPortrayed byKimmy RobertsonOnly appearanceMad As A HatterAppearances1 episode Alicewas a young secretary atWayne Enterprises. Alice was assigned to neuroscientistJervis Tetch, who grew a liking to her. She did not reciprocate as she was in a relationship withBilly. When Billy broke up with her after a fight, Tetch made his move. He took her out on a date, and managed to impress her.

characters.name: Andrea
characters.description: AndreaPersonal InformationNameAndreaSeries InformationPortrayed byJanet MayOnly appearanceMoon of the WolfAppearances1 Episode Andreawas a friend ofAnthony Romulus. She worked out with him andBruce Waynein the same gym. Bruce asked what Romulus' sudden obsession with Batman was, as it became the talk of the town that Romulus would double a sizeable charitable donation if Batman was the one who collected it. Anthony said it was not an obsession, rather that he wished to meet "Gotham's second-best athlete", which caused Andrea to giggle.

characters.name: Angelo's Patrons
characters.description: Angelo's PatronsPersonal InformationAffiliationAngelo'sRankCustomersSeries InformationPortrayed byUncreditedOnly appearanceBirds of a FeatherAppearances1 Episode Angelo's Patronsare the male and female solitaires atAngelo's.Binkyis the only one named. ThePenguinandVeronica Vreelandwent to dinner here after the Penguin was released fromStonegate Penitentiary. While he and Veronica dine, Penguin made loud and bad jokes and ate small fish whole, upsetting the other restaurant patrons who left in fear that he'll rob them.

characters.name: Animatronic Clown
characters.description: Animatronic ClownSeries InformationPortrayed byTim CurryOnly appearanceBe a ClownAppearances1 Episode TheAnimatronic Clownis an amusement park animatron. AfterJordanescaped theJoker, he encounters the Animatronic Clown who emits its creepy laugh, scaring Jordan. As Jordan looks back, he sees Joker popping his head from behind a booth revealing that he activated the clown to intimidate Jordan.

characters.name: Annie
characters.description: AnniePersonal InformationNameUnknownAffiliationClayfaceFatherClayface(creator/father)Series InformationPortrayed byFrancesca SmithFirst appearanceGrowing PainsLast appearanceGrowing PainsAppearances1 EpisodeAnniewas a clay creation ofClayfacewho appears once inThe New Batman Adventures After the events ofMudslide,Clayfaceremains were expose to some waste chemicals from a pipe near a factory, where he manage to reform himself, However he wasn't strong enough and was unaware of where he was, so he created Annie to look around and return back to him to see if it was safe. Unfortunately Annie forgot her orders the moment she leftClayfaceand wanderedGotham City. While continue walking, Annie (who was nameless at that time) end up on the bad side of the city and grab the unwanted attention of some Bikers but was saved by Robin. Afterwards she ran away telling him he can't help her as she was told to keep moving. She later appears again when Tim sees her going to the Bus Terminal as he told Alfred to stop as he dress as Robin.

characters.name: Arkady Duvall
characters.description: Arkady DuvallPersonal InformationNameArkady DuvallFatherRa's al GhulMotherDeceasedSibling(s)Talia(half-sister)Series InformationPortrayed byMalcolm McDowellOnly appearanceShowdownAppearances1 EpisodeArkady Duvallis the son ofRa's al Ghul. As Ra's al Ghul's son, Duvall studied in Heidelberg, and participated in the university's fencing club. Despite gaining a visible smite on his right cheek, he was the best of his class. However, he was also mentally unbalanced and arrogant. Because of this, his father knew he couldn't be his successor. After he finished his studies, he made the crossing to the Americas, and while on the East coast, he did something to a girl he shouldn't have. It was heavily implied he murdered or raped her. Sometime after this, he left forDevil's Holeto join his father, Ra's al Ghul, in the completion of thePhoenix. But because of his activities on the east coast, authorities placed a $200 bounty on his head. The bounty hunter and former soldierJonah Hexaccepted the assignment.

characters.name: Arkham Guard (Fear of Victory)
characters.description: Arkham GuardPersonal InformationAffiliationArkham AsylumRankOrderlySeries InformationPortrayed byMark Hamill(uncredited)Only appearanceFear of VictoryAppearances1 Episode TheArkham Guardwas an orderly working atArkham Asylum. He was seen on duty at his desk, when thenursebroughtJonathan Crane's dinner on a tray for him to give to Crane. After the nurse, the guard dumped the food in a trash can, just asBatmanemerged from the shadows and confronts him. Though the guard insists Scarecrow is inside his cell, Batman takes the keys from him to check personally whileRobinrestrains him. As Batman enters the cell, the terrified guard wrestles free and runs as Batman removes Scarecrow's hat, revealing it to be a decoy, and Scarecrow has indeed escaped.

characters.name: Armand Lydecker
characters.description: Armand LydeckerPersonal InformationNameArmand LydeckerAlias(es)VultureAffiliationThe Terrible TrioSeries InformationPortrayed byDavid JolliffeOnly appearanceThe Terrible TrioAppearances1 EpisodeArmand "Army" Lydeckerwas theVulture, a member ofThe Terrible Trio. Armand young heir to a company owned by an aerospace mogul, joined his companionsWarren LawfordandGunther Hardwickein the Terrible Trio group of millionaires turning to crime for the simple joy and thrill of it all. The three men then became respectively known as Vulture, Fox and Shark. But Vulture was gradually reluctant in some of their criminal acts, especially in an attack on their associateSheldon Fallbrook. Out of all the members, he showed the most concern while on the crime spree, but more so out of fear of getting busted, asBatmanwas on their tails, then he did in brutalization and deprivation of property of their victims.

characters.name: Armand Lydecker
characters.description: Armand LydeckerPersonal InformationNameArmand LydeckerAlias(es)VultureAffiliationThe Terrible TrioSeries InformationPortrayed byDavid JolliffeOnly appearanceThe Terrible TrioAppearances1 EpisodeArmand "Army" Lydeckerwas theVulture, a member ofThe Terrible Trio. Armand young heir to a company owned by an aerospace mogul, joined his companionsWarren LawfordandGunther Hardwickein the Terrible Trio group of millionaires turning to crime for the simple joy and thrill of it all. The three men then became respectively known as Vulture, Fox and Shark. But Vulture was gradually reluctant in some of their criminal acts, especially in an attack on their associateSheldon Fallbrook. Out of all the members, he showed the most concern while on the crime spree, but more so out of fear of getting busted, asBatmanwas on their tails, then he did in brutalization and deprivation of property of their victims.
